gh_e6f0376a5a9af058b67ed1d8.title: Solutions Architect - B2B SaaS Product company - Open salary
gh_e6f0376a5a9af058b67ed1d8.description:
**About the role**
- The Solutions Architect is a senior, hands-on member of Inspectorio's Architecture team. This is an individual-contributor role focused on designing and delivering practical technical solutions to business problems. The Solutions Architect partners closely with the Engineering Leadership Team and Product Management to translate business strategy into well-architected, secure, and cost-effective solutions across all architectural domains: Application (including adherence to Application Security Standards), Data, Integration, Presentation, and Infrastructure.
- Working within an established architecture team, the Solutions Architect helps define, apply, and continuously improve the architectural patterns, standards, and reference architectures that optimize total cost of ownership and reduce cycle time for delivery through reuse and consistency. They are expected to be deeply current on modern engineering and AI practices - including GenAI solution design, agentic workflows, and AI-assisted software development - and to bring that expertise into Inspectorio's products and engineering process. 
- A successful candidate combines strong technical depth with sound business judgment, communicates clearly across technical and non-technical audiences, and is equally comfortable producing a strategic reference architecture and getting hands-on with a proof of concept. 

**What you'll do**
- Design end-to-end solution architectures for assigned products and initiatives, ensuring alignment with Inspectorio's target architecture, enterprise patterns, and Application Security Standards. 
- Partner with engineering teams and product managers throughout the delivery lifecycle, providing architectural guidance, design reviews, and pragmatic decision support from discovery through production. 
- Contribute to the definition, documentation, and evolution of strategic platforms, architectural patterns, and reference architectures within the architecture community. 
- Apply architecture standards and governance in practice - helping teams adopt patterns, reuse components, and make sound build-vs-buy and technology-selection decisions. 
- Design AI and GenAI solution architectures, including retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), LLM gateway patterns, model selection and evaluation, vector/embedding stores, prompt and context management, and end-to-end observability and cost/token governance. 
- Architect agentic workflows and multi-agent systems - including tool/function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, orchestration, guardrails, human-in-the-loop controls, evaluation harnesses, and tracing. 
- Help define how AI coding assistants and agentic developer tooling (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI) are adopted, governed, and integrated into the SDLC to improve developer productivity, quality, and cycle time. 
- Continuously enhance the reliability, performance, scalability, and security of our products and platforms. 
- Produce clear technical documentation, architecture diagrams, and decision records (ADRs) that make designs understandable and actionable for engineering teams and stakeholders. 
- Build proofs of concept and reference implementations to de-risk new technologies and validate architectural approaches before broad adoption. 
- Act as a technical advisor and mentor to engineers and peers on architecture, modern engineering practices, and emerging technology trends. 
- Participate in the evaluation and selection of new software products, platforms, and AI tooling. 

**Qualifications**
- 6+ years of industry-relevant experience, including 4+ years as a solution, technical, or enterprise architect in a complex, ideally global, product or SaaS organization. 
- Demonstrated experience defining, designing, and implementing complex integration and distributed systems, including microservice and event-driven architectures, with an API-first mindset. 
- Proven ability to apply architecture standards and patterns practically to accelerate and enable delivery - balancing strategic intent with pragmatic execution. 
- Hands-on experience designing solutions on a major cloud platform (Google Cloud preferred; AWS or Azure acceptable), along with relevant middleware, messaging (e.g., Kafka/ESB), data, and infrastructure technologies. 
- Familiarity with technologies relevant to our products, including Python, Angular, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Google Cloud. 
- Practical experience architecting AI/GenAI solutions in production or near-production settings - RAG, LLM integration, evaluation, and the operational concerns (cost, latency, observability, safety) that come with them. 
- Working knowledge of agentic AI patterns and frameworks (e.g., agent orchestration, tool use, MCP) and the trade-offs involved in building reliable, observable agentic systems. 
- Hands-on familiarity with AI coding assistants and their role in the modern SDLC, including how to drive adoption, measure impact, and manage associated quality, security, and licensing considerations. 
- Awareness of responsible-AI and data-governance considerations, including handling of sensitive data (e.g., PII), prompt/data leakage risks, and model evaluation. 
- Excellent written and spoken English, with the ability to present ideas and concepts clearly and concisely to both technical and business audiences.

**_*This role is also open to Staff and Principal-level engineers with experience in design systems, cross-model dependencies, and platform solutions. We are particularly interested in candidates who have driven AI adoption in production environments and are ready to step up, take ownership, and grow within our organization._**

**Benefits:** 
- Remote-first environment 
- Flexible working hour, global team
- Full salary insurance 
- Premium healthcare PVI
- Unlimited days leave
- Well-being claim, lunch allowance, team building,..

gh_e6191f480fd2acaf1f330d6b.title: [Remoto/Híbrido São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro e Curitiba] Back-end  Engineer Python - Jcal Consultoria
gh_e6191f480fd2acaf1f330d6b.description:
🚀 OPORTUNIDADE INTERNACIONAL | BACK-END ENGINEER (PYTHON) | HEALTHCARE | 🌎💻(Mínimo 8 anos de experiências, Inglês avançado) 

🔗 Conecte-se comigo no LinkedIn:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thisclaudia


Se você é Engenheiro de Software Sênior e busca atuar em um ambiente global, com autonomia real e impacto direto no produto, essa oportunidade pode ser para você.
Estamos em busca de talentos para integrar uma empresa internacional do setor de Healthcare, trabalhando em projetos relevantes e com forte foco em qualidade, escalabilidade e inovação.
💡 Experiência com regulamentações como HIPAA/PHI é um diferencial, mas não obrigatória.
📍 Localização
Profissionais localizados em São Paulo ou Rio de Janeiro são bem-vindos a se candidatar.
🏡 A posição inicia 100% remota para profissionais residentes nestas localidades e posteriormente terá modelo híbrido em Curitiba (PR).

💰 Remuneração: USD $3.000k – $4.750k / mês

🔎 Requisitos Gerais
✔ Inglês avançado (colaboração com times dos Estados Unidos)
✔ +8 anos de experiência em desenvolvimento de software
✔ Ensino Superior Completo em Ciência da Computação, Engenharia de Software ou áreas correlatas
✔ Forte senso de ownership — da ideia à produção
✔ Perfil proativo, independente e orientado a resultados


💻 SENIOR BACK-END ENGINEER (PYTHON)

🎯 Missão da posição:
Construir serviços escaláveis, seguros e confiáveis, contribuindo diretamente para a evolução da plataforma.
Responsabilidades:
• Desenvolver APIs e serviços backend escaláveis
• Trabalhar com bancos de dados SQL e NoSQL
• Implementar testes automatizados (unitários, integração e e2e)
• Desenvolver e manter pipelines de CI/CD
• Atuar com monitoramento, métricas, logs e suporte em produção
• Contribuir com decisões técnicas e arquiteturais

⭐ Diferenciais
✔ Experiência com decisões arquiteturais pragmáticas
✔ Automação de processos e melhoria contínua
✔ Capacidade de identificar gargalos e propor soluções escaláveis
✔ Mentalidade forte de qualidade (sem time separado de QA)

💡 O mais importante: buscamos profissionais com autonomia, responsabilidade e mentalidade de produto.

Se essa oportunidade faz sentido para você ou para alguém da sua rede, compartilhe ou entre em contato neste link abaixo 👇🏻 
https://wa.me/5519978164262?text=Ol%C3%A1%0ASeja%20muito%20bem%20vindo(a)%0AVoc%C3%AA%20entrou%20em%20contato%20para%20conversarmos%20sobre%20oportunidades,%20logo%20mais%20irei%20te%20atender

gh_e69a66e5d4446a6782d444c6.title: [São Leopoldo/RS] SAP FI/CO Senior Analyst na STIHL Ferramentas Motorizadas
gh_e69a66e5d4446a6782d444c6.description:
Vaga Híbrida 

**## Nossa empresa**

Como uma empresa familiar inovadora e marca líder global no campo de motosserras e ferramentas elétricas, estamos intensamente envolvidos em robótica, baterias recarregáveis, engenharia elétrica, comércio eletrônico e digitalização, além das áreas de negócios tradicionais. Oferecemos todos os pré-requisitos para o crescimento pessoal e profissional. Juntamente com mais de 19.000 funcionários, estamos moldando o futuro - com visão de futuro e senso de responsabilidade.

**## Descrição da vaga**

A pessoa Analista Sênior SAP FI/CO atuará como parceiro estratégico para as áreas de Finanças e Controladoria, agindo para garantir alinhamento entre as necessidades dos nossos usuários e as soluções tecnológicas, atuando de forma colaborativa, proativa e com total autonomia para impulsionar os resultados do negócio no Brasil e no mundo.

- Assegurar a evolução, estabilidade e performance dos sistemas #SAP #S/4HANA e aplicações satélites, com foco total nos módulos de Finanças e Controladoria.
- Desenvolver e aprimorar soluções que conectam o #SAP com sistemas satélites, como o SAP Concur e plataformas de comércio exterior (Thomson Reuters OSGT), otimizando os processos financeiros e contábeis.
- Conduzir o ciclo completo de projetos e demandas para os módulos FI/CO, desde o levantamento de requisitos com a área de negócio até a entrega da solução, utilizando metodologias ágeis ou tradicionais.
- Atuar como ponto focal para a sustentação dos sistemas, liderando a resolução de problemas complexos, identificando a causa raiz e implementando correções definitivas para garantir a fluidez das operações.
- Liderar e participar de reuniões com nossos times multidisciplinares, garantindo o alinhamento global das nossas soluções, sempre com foco na Governança de TI em primeiro lugar.

**## Local**

Híbrido em São Leopoldo, Rio Grande do Sul, Brasil.

**## Requisitos**

**Obrigatórios:**
- Inglês avançado
- Superior completo.
- Experiência sólida e comprovada nos principais processos de Contabilidade Financeira, (FI-AP, FI-AR, FI-AA,FI-GL)
- Domínio dos processos de Controladoria (CO-CCA, CO-OM,CO-PA)

**Desejáveis:**
- Conhecimento em SAP Concur.
- Conhecimento com sistemas de comércio exterior, como Thomson Reuters ONESOURCE Global Trade (OSGT), ou conhecimento dos processos de Comex e sua integração com as áreas financeira e contábil.

**Diferenciais:**
-Vivência anterior no segmento industrial metal mecânico.
- Experiência com interface com times globais e utilização diária do idioma inglês.

## Benefícios

- -Participação nos Lucros, ligado ao resultado financeiroda Empresa.
- Assistência médica Unimed, extensiva aos dependentes.
- Ambulatório na empresa disponível para o funcionário realizar consultas com clínico geral,sem custo.
- Uniodonto Nacional, extensivo aos dependentes.
- Seguro de Vida.
- Programa de Previdência Privada, 100% aportado pela STIHL.
- Transporte Fretado.
- Estacionamento próprio da empresa, sem custo ao colaborador.
- Restaurante na Empresa, servido por fornecedor especializado em refeições corporativas.
- Incentivo a Educação: disponível após 12 meses de contrato, o profissional torna-se elegível a receber da STIHL um percentual para curso de graduação ou pós-graduação
- Plataforma de Treinamentos Online.
- Licença maternidade e paternidade estendida.
- Núcleo de Qualidade de Vida.
- TotalPass

**## Contratação**

CLT

**## Como se candidatar**

Por favor, acesso o link: https://jobs.stihl.com/job-invite/55772/

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 15 dias após cada processo.

#### Alocação
- Alocado em São Leopoldo, RS, BR

#### Regime
- CLT

#### Nível
- Sênior

gh_e62f5dcff54592ebd257e117.title: 🛠 Senior Front-End Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
gh_e62f5dcff54592ebd257e117.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As our Front-End Engineer, you are tasked with the development of engaging, intuitive, and visually compelling user interfaces for our web app product. You will work in close collaboration with designers and back-end engineers, and the marketing team, transmuting design mockups, user stories, and wireframes into high-quality code, thereby ensuring an immersive and seamless user experience.

## **Your Journey as a Front-End Engineer**

- Our front-end ecosystem is fortified with **TypeScript.**
    - React, and Material UI (MUI)
    - React Native for mobile front-end development.
- As front-end engineers, we take pride in precise design execution, valuing pixel-perfect implementation and employing Figma to maintain alignment with original designs.
- Collaborative work culture is our ethos.
    - Work in tandem with a cross-functional team through the development cycle, from front-end frameworks, and front-end service design to deployment.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Write clean, reusable, and testable code for easy maintenance by yourself and your fellow software engineers.
    - Partner with engineers from various teams to create user-delighting features.
    - Collaborate with our design team to understand and address user pain points.
    - Drive enhancements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop new tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and accountability for your work.
- API integration is a critical part of your role.
    - Integrate APIs according to spec with front-end frameworks.
- Build, mange, and reuse UI components effectively.
    - Keep UI components organized.
    - Reuse UI component to maximize efficiency, robustness, and user experience.
- Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
- Engage in the regular launch of new markets, features, or products.

## **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or a similar role internship.
3. Proficiency in web development frameworks, especially JavaScript, React, and Material UI (MUI).
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

With your craftsmanship, you'll help to shape the user interface of our software, driving our mission forward through stunning visual experiences. Are you ready to create?

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)
